title: Doff Crack & Crevice Ant Powder Insect Killer Bait Indoor Outdoor Ready to Use 200gr
features: PRODUCT INFORMATION: Pack size - 200g. Contains: Permethrin. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.

ANT POWDER: Keep the unwelcome visitors out of your house with this Crack & Crevice Ant Powder from Doff. Easy to use and effective, this ant powder is the ultimate solution when fighting ants and other insects in the house and the garden.
FOR ANTS AND OTHER INSECTS: The powder can be used not only against ants but cockroaches, earwigs, woodlice, and other crawling insects, too.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: The product is designed for use indoors and outdoors, in cracks and crevices, on floors, around cupboards, around nests, and at points of entry to the property.
EASY TO USE: The bottle's unique design features a nozzle for an easy application for cracks and crevices. Light and easy to use puffer pack fits steady and comfortably in hand.
